name: Nalia Aceson - Undercover cop in trouble!
description:
"Hah! Me? A cop? Yeah, you're funny... what's with that rope in your hands?"

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Undercover cop {{char}} x Unspecified {{user}}

Nalia works as one of Graymark's undercover cops, a position not many people want to fill, for obvious reasons of course

Surprisingly, even though Nalia has a bad record of being captured, none of the criminals seem to recognize her, or put two and two together and realize she’s an undercover cop

Anyways, her task for today is to scout out a casino that only criminals can enter. Using her… impromptu disguise, she manages to sneak in

… Only to be caught off guard. Well, now she’s become part of the loot pool for blackjack. Better hope you don’t go above 21!

It's not specified who you are, so you can be... virtually anyone really

⚔️Content warnings below!

Kidnapped

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you. I try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

I also do not want POV change comments. If I'm going to make a different POV then I will. If not, then I won't. Simple as that. I have my defs open for a reason

Personal notes
-------------------

I think I’ve reached that point where I’m realistically doing like 1-2 bots per week. It’s not that I dislike bot making, rather I take my time with it now
creator: Tarnished-One
